materialization_method: Repaired repo-local dsqgen with COUNT=1, QUALIFY=Y, SCALE=1, DIALECT=ansi using a temporary /tmp directory containing query14a.tpl and ansi.tpl; source.sql applies only PostgreSQL witness-execution syntax normalization and preserves both generated SELECT statements.
notes: The exact dsqgen output is preserved in provenance/query14a_instance_raw.sql.
No MySQL, Spark, plan, admission, promotion, common-core, or registry facts are claimed.
